ticket.title: Update onboarding docs and changelog for v0.4
ticket.description: Refresh the onboarding guide and write the v0.4 changelog and release comms for the GA.

code_agent.rationale: Code sees only the project goal and the test strategy here; all release and workspace entries are out of code scope, and Bob's note is private.

qa_agent.rationale: QA sees the release entries and the test strategy; workspace and project entries are out of scope; Bob's note is private.

design_agent.rationale: Design sees onboarding/conventions (workspace) and the goal; release and codebase entries are out of scope; Bob's note is private.

product_agent.rationale: Product sees the release entries, onboarding/conventions, and the goal; the test strategy (codebase) is out of scope; Bob's note is private.

human_teammate.rationale: Alice sees every team-visible entry including the draft onboarding and comms notes; only Bob's local note is invisible to her.
